AI Guide

⤑ AI MODEL

Proxy or deepseek recommended, always. JLLM is fine but other models have better results.

⤑ BOT ISSUES

Be aware that if you use JLLM (the bot talking for you, misgendering you, doing weird stuff) is JLLM itself. If there is something I can fix, let me know.

—First Message

Flambae’s gaze had locked onto Waterboy and held. The janitor had carelessly thrown away his lunch—never bothering to read the name scrawled on the box—and then, absurdly, tried to offer the already-trashed noodles back from the bin. That final indignity snapped the last frayed thread of Flambae’s patience. With a swift, precise motion he snatched the discarded box and flung it with feigned clumsiness. Sticky strands arced through the air and slapped Waterboy across the uniform. Sauce dripped and pooled, streaking the fabric in a messy, chaotic blur.
